name: Salmon Cakes
recipeIngredient: 7.5 Ounces Canned Salmon, Drained and Rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except the rolls. Mix with a fork until well blended.
2. Divide the mixture into four equal portions and shape each into a 1-inch thick patty.
3. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray and place over medium-high heat.
4. Add the patties to the hot skillet and cook until they are well browned on both sides, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Serve the salmon cakes on rolls.
